detaileddescription.para: Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Enumeration of all the available eye camera sensors.
Enumeration of all the available eye camera sensors.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate the camera settings.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLEyeCameraSettingsInit before use.

briefdescription.para: A structure to encapsulate per plane info for each camera frame.
A structure to encapsulate output data for each camera sensor.
A structure to encapsulate all the eye camera data.

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLEyeCameraDataInit before use.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the camera settings structure. Shall be called before calling MLEyeCameraConnect().

parameterdescription.para: Set up the version for inout_eye_camera_data.
A pointer to camera handle to be used in later APIs.
One of the parameters is invalid.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.
One of the parameters is invalid.

detaileddescription.para: Returns MLEyeCameraData with this latest data when available. The memory is owned by the system. Application should copy the data it needs to cache and release the memory by calling MLEyeCameraReleaseCameraData.
This is a blocking call. API is not thread safe.
If there are no new camera frames within the timeout_ms duration then the API will return MLResult_Timeout.

parameterdescription.para: Eye camera data. Will be set to NULL if no valid data is available at this time.
One of the parameters is invalid.
Returned because no new frame available at this time.

detaileddescription.para: This function should be called exactly once for each call to MLEyeCameraGetLatestCameraData.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a valid MLEyeCameraData object.
One of the parameters is invalid.

detaileddescription.para: This will disconnect from all the eye camera(s) currently connected.
